queries.question: Describe the benefit we have for every employer.
queries.sql: SELECT Benefits.description  from Employers_Benefits join Benefits on Employers_Benefits.benefit_id = Benefits.id join Employers on Employers_Benefits.employer_id = Employers.id   GROUP BY Employers_Benefits.benefit_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Employers_Benefits.employer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Employers)

queries.question: Describe the benefit we have for every employer.
queries.sql: select employers.name , benefits.description from Employers_Benefits join Benefits on Employers_Benefits.benefit_id = Benefits.id join Employers on Employers_Benefits.employer_id = Employers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?employers_benefits a :Employers_Benefits .
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?employers_benefits p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?employers a :Employers .
  ?employers_benefits p:hasEmployers ?employers .
  ?employers p:name ?name .
  ?benefits p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What are the names and descriptions of the benefits that are common to all employers?
queries.sql: SELECT Benefits.benefit_name, Benefits.description  from Employers_Benefits join Benefits on Employers_Benefits.benefit_id = Benefits.id join Employers on Employers_Benefits.employer_id = Employers.id   GROUP BY Employers_Benefits.benefit_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Employers_Benefits.employer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Employers)

queries.question: What are all of the benefits listed against every single employer?
queries.sql: select employers.name , benefits.benefit_name from Employers_Benefits join Benefits on Employers_Benefits.benefit_id = Benefits.id join Employers on Employers_Benefits.employer_id = Employers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?benefit_name WHERE {
  ?employers_benefits a :Employers_Benefits .
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?employers_benefits p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?employers a :Employers .
  ?employers_benefits p:hasEmployers ?employers .
  ?employers p:name ?name .
  ?benefits p:benefit_name ?benefit_name .
}

queries.question: For every employer, list the names and descriptions of the benefits they offer.
queries.sql: select employers.name , benefits.benefit_name , benefits.description from Employers_Benefits join Benefits on Employers_Benefits.benefit_id = Benefits.id join Employers on Employers_Benefits.employer_id = Employers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?benefit_name ?description WHERE {
  ?employers_benefits a :Employers_Benefits .
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?employers_benefits p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?employers a :Employers .
  ?employers_benefits p:hasEmployers ?employers .
  ?employers p:name ?name .
  ?benefits p:benefit_name ?benefit_name .
  ?benefits p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What benefits are listed for all employers?
queries.sql: SELECT Benefits.benefit_name  from Employers_Benefits join Benefits on Employers_Benefits.benefit_id = Benefits.id join Employers on Employers_Benefits.employer_id = Employers.id   GROUP BY Employers_Benefits.benefit_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Employers_Benefits.employer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Employers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Describe the benefit we have for every employer.
Show me the names and descriptions of the benefits each employer offers.
What benefits are listed for all employers?
